channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Omar Abdullah accuses BJP of offering MLA ₹20-30 crore and statehood for political switch; party demands evidence
item.description: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah has accused the BJP of approaching one of his National Conference MLAs with a lucrative offer, including ₹20-30 crore cash, a ministerial position, and p...

item.title: Nigerian Army rescues 46 hostages after 56 days in captivity
item.description: The Nigerian Army successfully rescued 39 pupils and 7 teachers after 56 days in captivity during a joint operation involving multiple security agencies. Led by Maj. Gen. Chinedu Nnebeife, the intelli...

item.title: Arrest of Man Suspected in Ann Widdecombe's Murder
item.description: A 28-year-old man has been arrested in South Yorkshire on suspicion of murdering Ann Widdecombe, a former Conservative minister and Reform UK spokesperson. The suspect, a white British national, is cu...

item.title: Kwara PDP Criticizes Abdulrazaq Over Woro Abduction Crisis
item.description: The Kwara State chapter of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) is celebrating the successful rescue of 49 abducted school children and teachers in Oyo State, calling it a triumph of responsible leaders...

item.title: Judicial Commission Faces Political Challenges in Selecting Islamabad High Court Judges
item.description: The Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) is set to select three judges for the Islamabad High Court (IHC), a process that has become politically sensitive due to opposition protests and demands from ...

item.title: VAR Review Leads to Breel Embolo's Red Card in Argentina-Switzerland World Cup Match
item.description: In a dramatic turn of events during the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final between Argentina and Switzerland, Breel Embolo faced controversy after receiving a red card. The incident occurred in the 72n...

item.title: Ultra-Fine Bubbles Offer Cleaner Inkjet Printing for Advanced Electronics
item.description: Researchers at Tokyo Metropolitan University have developed a groundbreaking method to enhance inkjet printing by utilizing ultra-fine bubbles instead of traditional chemical additives. This innovatio...

item.title: ACT Policing appeals for public assistance to locate missing 13-year-old Immi Mowle
item.description: A 13-year-old girl named Immi Mowle has been missing since July 4, 2026, and ACT Policing is urgently appealing for public assistance to locate her. Immi was last seen in Wanniassa at 10:30am on Satur...

item.title: Czech Star Linda Noskova Claims First Wimbledon Title Amid Dramatic Comeback
item.description: Linda Noskova, the ninth-seeded Czech player, clinched her maiden Grand Slam title at Wimbledon after a heart-stopping final against compatriot Karolina Muchova. The match, held on Centre Court, becam...

item.title: Dating Apps Embrace AI to Combat User Burnout and Shift Toward Human Connection
item.description: Dating apps are increasingly relying on artificial intelligence to address declining user engagement and burnout among younger generations. The article highlights how platforms like Bumble and Hinge a...

item.title: Authoritarian Movements and Migration Concerns in South Africa
item.description: The article discusses the rise of authoritarian movements in South Africa, particularly the group 'March and March,' which is opposing undocumented migration. These groups are demanding that migrants ...

item.title: England Advances to World Cup Semifinals with Bellingham's Heroics
item.description: In a thrilling encounter, England secured their place in the World Cup semifinals after defeating Norway 2-1. Tottenham's Jude Bellingham was the standout performer, scoring both goals to propel his t...

item.title: Czech star Linda Noskova wins first Wimbledon title in thrilling match

item.title: Ninja Slushi Twist: Dual-Vessel Frozen Drink Machine Review
item.description: The article reviews the Ninja Slushi Twist, a dual-chamber frozen drink machine designed for home use. It highlights the device's ability to prepare two different frozen beverages simultaneously, such...

item.title: Ontario tribunal finds long-term resident without legal immigration status eligible for Ontario Works benefits under current legislation
item.description: An Ontario Social Benefits Tribunal has ruled that a man who has lived in Canada without legal immigration status for more than two decades is eligible to receive financial assistance through the Onta...

item.title: South Africa's Rugby Team Faces Challenges in Nations Championship Clash Against Scotland
item.description: The Springboks faced a challenging encounter against Scotland in the Nations Championship at Loftus Versfeld, where cultural displays and stadium innovations added to the spectacle. Scottish performer...

item.title: El Niño Disrupts Pacific Fisheries with Divergent Impacts
item.description: El Niño, a natural climate phenomenon characterized by warmer-than-average sea surface temperatures in the Pacific, is already causing significant disruptions to fisheries worldwide. In Peru, anchovy ...

item.title: Nasarawa Amazons Clinch Third Federation Cup Title After Penalty Shootout
item.description: Nasarawa Amazons FC of Lafia have secured their third President Federation Cup title after a thrilling 5-4 penalty shootout victory over Heartland Queens of Owerri in the final match held at Asaba Sta...

item.title: Controversial goal sparks debate in England-Norway World Cup clash
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup quarter-final clash between England and Norway, controversy surrounded the lead-up to England's first goal. Norway's goalkeeper, Orjan Nyland, took a goal kick that appeared to...

item.title: Generational Attitudes and the Conversation on Reproduction
item.description: The article explores generational tensions around reproduction, using a conversation between the author and a young man about vasectomies. The author reflects on how older generations often criticize ...
